blocks.title: QQQ Price Trend

dataContract.description: Historical price data for QQQ ETF

blocks.sub_question: What is the price history of the QQQ ETF over the last 30 days?

data.enriched_prompt: Retrieve the historical OHLCV price data for the QQQ ETF (e.g., last 1 year) to plot a line chart of its price trend, and also obtain the latest real‑time quote for QQQ. Optionally compute basic performance metrics such as annualized return, annualized volatility, and maximum drawdown to supplement the visualization. Return the historical price series (date and closing price) and the current price, along with any computed metrics.
data.analysis_type: Single asset price visualization with optional performance metrics
data.suggested_workflow: Step 1: Use financial_data__get_historical_data to fetch QQQ's historical OHLCV data. Step 2: Use financial_data__get_real_time_data to fetch the current QQQ price. Step 3: Apply analytics_engine__calculate_annualized_return, analytics_engine__calculate_annualized_volatility, and analytics_engine__calculate_drawdown on the historical series to derive performance stats. Step 4: Package the date‑price series for the line‑chart block and include the latest price and any metrics in the response.
